<!-- Thanks for contributing to Posh Palette! Keep PRs small — ideally one layer/theme each. -->

## What this changes


## Checklist

- [ ] `id` is kebab-case and matches the filename (e.g. `tokyo-night.json` → `"id": "tokyo-night"`)
- [ ] If I added a full theme, the referenced `scheme` / `palette` / `prompt` ids all exist
- [ ] **Scheme or palette changed?** Updated the matching card in `docs/themes.html` so site == reality — the **Gallery sync** CI check enforces this ([why](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#keep-the-gallery-in-sync))
- [ ] Colors are legible — the contrast check (`tests/Contrast.Tests.ps1`) passes
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
